pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release property to 17 to target Java 17 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project continues to compile against the previous Java version (e.g., 8 or 11), failing to utilize Java 17 features or meet the migration requirement.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot.
